name: Critical Hit +
desc: You get more critical hits
descZh: 提高暴击几率

funcNote: 缺:游泳浮力/阻力微调。核心的水下呼吸完整生效。
name: Breathless
desc: You can no longer drown, and can move in liquids with ease.
descZh: 你不再会溺亡，并且可在液体中轻松移动。

name: Greed
desc: You gain double the gold per nugget.
descZh: 每个金块换算两倍黄金。

name: Trick Greed
desc: 4x instead of 2x gold is dropped when death is an accident.
descZh: 造成敌人意外死亡时，掉落黄金 x4（原为 x2）。

name: Gold Is Forever
desc: Gold nuggets never disappear.
descZh: 金块绝不会消失。

name: Trick Blood Money
desc: Blood money is dropped when death is an accident.
descZh: 造成敌人意外死亡时，掉落抚恤金。

name: Exploding Gold
desc: Gold dropped by enemies explodes when it disappears, is picked up or touched by other enemies!
descZh: 敌人掉落的黄金会在消失、被拾起或被其他敌人触碰时爆炸！

name: Strong Levitation
desc: You can fly 100% longer.
descZh: 你的飞行距离加倍。

funcNote: 缺:下落重力微调(×1.4)。悬浮加速本体完整生效。
name: Faster Levitation
desc: You levitate 75% faster.
descZh: 上升速度提高 75%。

name: Faster Movement
desc: Your movement speed is increased.
descZh: 你的移动速度加快。

name: Never Skip Leg Day
desc: Your kicks deal extra damage and knockback.
descZh: 你的踢击会造成额外的伤害和击退。

name: Telekinetic Kick
desc: You gain new telekinetic powers.
descZh: 你获得全新的念动力能力。

name: Repelling Cape
desc: Stains drop at a fast rate (when moving).
descZh: （移动时）脏污褪去的速度提升。

funcNote: 缺:「与神的关系」计数 -1。尸爆与爆炸免疫完整生效。
name: Exploding Corpses
desc: Enemies explode upon death, but you gain immunity to explosive damage.
descZh: 敌人死亡时会爆炸，但你会免疫爆炸伤害。

funcNote: 缺:「与神的关系」计数 +1。免死保留 1 HP 完整生效。
name: Saving Grace
desc: If you would die and have more than 1 HP, your HP is set to 1 instead.
descZh: 生命值高于 1 时，将以生命值降为 1 代替死亡。

name: Invisibility
desc: You're invisible. Stains, casting spells, kicking and taking damage makes you temporarily visible.
descZh: 你隐身了。脏污、施放法术、踢击和受伤会暂时令你可见。

funcNote: 缺:「与神的关系」计数 -1。效果完整生效。
name: More Blood
desc: Blood blood blood.
descZh: 血呀，到处都是！

name: All-Seeing Eye
desc: You can see everywhere.
descZh: 所有地方都能看见。

name: Levitation Trail
desc: When levitating, you leave a trail of magical sparks that harm passing creatures.
descZh: 漂浮时，你留下一串魔法火花轨迹，伤害经过的生物。

funcNote: 缺:血上限 -25% 的代价。吸血与食物中毒免疫生效 —— 注入后比原版天赋更强。
name: Vampirism
desc: You lose 25% maximum health, but can replenish health by drinking blood.\nBlood doesn't affect satiation level and you no longer suffer from food poisoning.
descZh: 你丧失 25% 最大生命值，但饮用血液可以补充生命值。\n血液不会影响饱食度，且你从食物中毒中痊愈。

name: Extra Health (One-off)
desc: You gain 50% extra maximum health.
descZh: 50% 追加生命值上限。

name: Stronger Hearts
desc: Hearts bestow more maximum health.
descZh: 心可赋予更多最大生命值。

funcNote: 缺:血上限锁定 50 的代价。5 倍伤害生效 —— 注入后比原版天赋更强。
name: Glass Cannon
desc: Your spells are 5 times as powerful, but your maximum health becomes 50 and cannot be increased by normal hearts.
descZh: 你的法术强度变为 5 倍，但最大生命值变为 50 且无法通过普通的心增加。

name: Living on the Edge
desc: Your spells deal 3x damage when you're under 25 HP or 25% of maximum health.
descZh: 生命值少于 25 或最大生命值的 25% 时，法术造成 3 倍伤害。

funcNote: 缺:「与神的关系」计数 +1。死亡复活完整生效。
name: Extra Life (One-off)
desc: Upon death you respawn with 100 health.
descZh: 死亡时，你将以 100 生命值重生。

name: Worm Attractor
desc: Worms find you attractive.
descZh: 蠕虫认为你魅力非凡。

name: Enemy Radar
desc: You can sense nearby enemies.
descZh: 可以感应附近的敌人。

name: Eat Your Vegetables
desc: You inflict more damage the more satiated you are, but you start losing health if your stomach is empty.
descZh: 越饱足时造成的伤害越高，但如果腹中空空就会开始丧失生命值。

name: Iron Stomach
desc: You no longer suffer from negative effects of eating.
descZh: 你不再因食用物品而受到负面效果。

name: Wand Radar
desc: You can sense nearby wands.
descZh: 可以感应附近的魔杖。

name: Item Radar
desc: You can sense nearby items.
descZh: 可以感应附近的物品。

name: Moon Radar
desc: You can sense lunar energy.
descZh: 可以感应月能。

name: Spatial Awareness
desc: If you stop for a moment, you can sense your location relative to the Mountain.
descZh: 如果些许驻足，便可感受相对神圣之山的相对位置。

name: Fire Immunity
desc: You take no damage from fire.
descZh: 火焰不会对你造成伤害。

name: Toxic Immunity
desc: You take no damage from toxic sludge and other toxic things.
descZh: 毒液和其他带毒之物不会对你造成伤害。

name: Explosion Immunity
desc: You take no direct damage from explosions.
descZh: 爆炸不会对你造成直接伤害。

name: Melee Immunity
desc: You take no damage from close-range enemy attacks.
descZh: 敌人的近距离攻击不会对你造成伤害。

name: Electricity Immunity
desc: You take no damage from electric shocks.
descZh: 电击不会对你造成伤害。

name: Teleportitis
desc: You take 20% less damage. You teleport away every time you're hurt.
descZh: 受到伤害减少 20%。每次受到伤害时，传送自身。

name: Teleportitis Dodge
desc: You teleport a short distance away when an enemy projectile is near.
descZh: 敌人的投射物接近时，你会传送一小段距离以脱离。

name: Stainless Armour
desc: You take 50% less damage as long as you have no active stain status effect.
descZh: 没有受到脏污效果影响时，受到伤害减少 50%。

name: Tinker With Wands Everywhere
desc: A divine blessing allows you to tinker with wands everywhere.
descZh: 神圣祝福令你能够随地修补魔杖。

funcNote: 缺:+20% 敌人掉落血钱几率。注意:「禁止编辑法杖」的负面效果会生效,这是换取收益的诅咒类天赋。
name: No Wand Tinkering
desc: Wands cannot be tinkered with, but enemies may drop blood money.
descZh: 魔杖无法修补，但敌人会掉落抚恤金。

name: Wand Experimenter
desc: Firing newly found and unmodified wands heals you.
descZh: 使用新近找到和未经修改的魔杖可为你带来治疗。

name: Healthy Exploration
desc: Every time you visit a new area, you regain 60 health.
descZh: 每次进入新的区域，获得 60 点生命值。

name: Bombs Materialized
desc: Bomb-like spells can be placed in the ITEMS space in inventory and used like throwable items.
descZh: 类似炸弹的法术可放置于物品栏的物品空间，如同投掷物品一般使用。

name: Homing Shots
desc: Your spells home towards enemies very slightly.
descZh: 你所有法术都会轻微追踪敌人。

name: Boomerang Spells
desc: Your spells arc towards you, but gain extra speed and deal extra damage.
descZh: 你的法术划出弧线向你飞来，但会获得额外的速度并造成额外伤害。

name: Unlimited Spells
desc: Most spells are now unlimited.
descZh: 大多数法术现在没有限制了。

funcNote: 缺:冰冻光环本体(由脚本生成的子实体)。注入只获得附带的火焰免疫,拿不到招牌能力。
name: Freeze Field
desc: Liquids freeze in your presence.
descZh: 冻结你附近的液体。

name: Gas fire
desc: Gases near you ignite automatically.
descZh: 你附近的气体会自动点燃。

name: Dissolve Powders
desc: Sand and other soft, powdery materials dissolve quickly in your presence.
descZh: 砂粒以及其他柔软粉末状材料会在你附近快速消融。

funcNote: 缺:血液变粘液的外观与 25% 投射物减伤。「粘液不减速」生效。
name: Slime Blood
desc: You bleed slime, but slime no longer slows you down and you have higher projectile resistance.
descZh: 你流血时会淌出粘液，但粘液不再会令你缓慢，且你拥有更高的投射物耐性。

funcNote: 缺:血液变油的外观。「火焰免疫」生效。
name: Oil Blood
desc: You bleed flammable oil, but are immune to fire.
descZh: 你流血时会淌出可燃油脂，但会免疫火焰。

funcNote: 缺:血液变毒气的外观。「毒素免疫」生效。
name: Gas Blood
desc: You bleed flammable gas instead of blood.
descZh: 你流血时会放出可燃气体。

name: Permanent Shield
desc: You gain a small, permanent shield.
descZh: 你获得一面永久性的小型护盾。

name: Revenge Explosion
desc: You release a magical explosion upon taking damage, and gain 25% resistance against explosions.
descZh: 受伤时产生魔法爆炸，并获得针对爆炸的 25% 耐性。

name: Revenge Tentacle
desc: You summon a monstrous tentacle upon taking damage, and gain 25% resistance against projectiles.
descZh: 受伤时召唤一条巨大的触手，并获得针对投射物的 25% 耐性。

name: Revenge Rats
desc: When you take damage, there's a chance that a helpful rat minion is summoned
descZh: 受伤时有几率召唤一只老鼠仆从帮手

name: Revenge bullets
desc: You return fire when hit by projectiles, and you gain 20% resistance against explosions and projectiles.
descZh: 被投射物击中时会还以颜色，同时获得针对爆炸和投射物的 20% 耐性

name: Lukki Mutation
desc: You grow curious additional limbs that fight for you.
descZh: 你长出奇特的额外肢体。它们会为你而战。

name: Leggy Mutation
desc: You grow disturbing looking limbs that fight for you.
descZh: 你长出看上去颇为令人困扰的肢体。它们会为你而战。

name: Plague Rats
desc: Dying enemies release rats to serve your bidding! All rats become your friend.
descZh: 濒死敌人释放出鼠群为你服务！所有鼠群成为你的朋友。

name: Spontaneous Generation
desc: Vomit near you evolves into helpful rat minions
descZh: 你附近的呕吐物变成有用的老鼠仆从

name: Cordyceps
desc: Fungal creatures spawn from the corpses of enemies killed by you.
descZh: 从被你击杀的敌人尸体上生出真菌生物。

name: Fungal Colony
desc: Slime near you spontaneously turns into fungal creatures.
descZh: 你附近的粘液自动变为真菌生物。

funcNote: 缺:缩小蠕虫洞的脚本(天赋主体)。注入只获得附带的驱虫效果。
name: Feared by Worms
desc: Worms run away from you, and worm and lukki enemies no longer destroy terrain while burrowing.
descZh: 蠕虫会逃避于你，同时蠕虫和路奇在潜藏时不再会破坏地形。

name: Projectile Repulsion Field
desc: Most projectiles are repulsed by your presence, but you take slightly more projectile damage.
descZh: 大多数投射物会被你的存在所排斥，但投射物会对你造成稍微多一点的伤害。

name: Close Call
desc: You gain additional chance to deal critical hits as long as there are enemies near you.
descZh: 只要附近有敌人，你便获得额外的暴击几率。

name: Fungal Disease
desc: When near danger, you sprout fungal growths.
descZh: 在靠近危险时，你身上的真菌将会生长。

name: Projectile Slower
desc: Projectiles near you slow down.
descZh: 接近你的投射物速度变慢。

name: Projectile Repulsion Sector
desc: Projectiles that fly into a small sector in front of you get blown away.
descZh: 飞入你前方小区域的投射物会被吹飞。

name: Projectile Eater
desc: Projectiles that fly into a small sector behind of you disappear.
descZh: 飞入你后方小区域的投射物会消失。

name: Phasing
desc: Projectiles seemingly phase through you.
descZh: 投射物似乎会以相位形式穿越你。

name: Angry ghost
desc: An angry spirit comes to your aid, copying nearby spells and projectiles.
descZh: 一个愤怒的精魂来帮助你，复制附近的法术和投射物。

name: Hungry Ghost
desc: Summons a happy minion who'll eat enemy projectile every now and then.
descZh: 召唤一个快乐的仆从，它会不时吃掉敌人的投射物。

name: Mournful Spirit
desc: Dying creatures leave behind a spirit that deals damage in a small area.
descZh: 濒死生物会留下一个灵魂，对小区域造成伤害。

name: Homunculus
desc: Every time you leave a Holy Mountain, a helpful homunculus is summoned.
descZh: 每次离开神圣之山时，召唤一个人造人提供帮助。

name: Lukki Minion
desc: Summons a lukki minion to your help.
descZh: 召唤一个路奇仆从帮手。

funcNote: 缺:电击光环本体(由脚本生成的子实体)。注入只获得附带的电击免疫,拿不到招牌能力。
name: Electricity
desc: You're immune to electric damage, but metal and liquids around you electrify constantly. Look out!
descZh: 免疫雷电伤害，但附近的金属和液体经常会通电。小心哟！

name: Attract Gold
desc: Gold nuggets gravitate towards you.
descZh: 金块被你吸引。

name: Extra Knockback on Spells
desc: Your spells knock enemies around with more force.
descZh: 法术以更大力道将敌人击退。

name: Concentrated Spells
desc: Your spells have lower spread and extra damage, but have increased cast delay.
descZh: 你的法术散射更小，伤害更高，但施放延迟增加。

name: Low Recoil
desc: Recoil caused by your spells is greatly reduced, but your spells fly slightly slower.
descZh: 法术造成的后座力大幅下降，但你的法术飞行速度略微减慢。

name: Bouncing Spells
desc: Almost all your spells bounce around and last longer.
descZh: 几乎你的所有法术都能够弹跳，且持续时间更久。

name: Faster Projectiles
desc: Your projectile spells fly faster than before.
descZh: 你的投射物的飞行速度加快。

name: Always Cast (One-off)
desc: A random Always Cast spell is added to the wand in your hand, up to a maximum of 4.
descZh: 你手中的魔杖追加随机的始终施放法术，最多 4 个。

name: High Mana, Low Capacity (One-off)
desc: Your currently held wand loses half its capacity, but gains more mana.
descZh: 目前手持的魔杖丧失一半容量，但获得更多的法力。

name: No More Shuffle
desc: Most of the wands will be non shuffling. The wands you carry with you turn into non-shufflers too.
descZh: 大多数魔杖为非乱序魔杖。你持有的魔杖也会变成非乱序魔杖。

name: No More Knockback
desc: Enemies can no longer knock you back.
descZh: 敌人不再可将你击退。

name: Projectile duplication
desc: Your projectile spells have a chance to duplicate, but you're more vulnerable to projectile damage
descZh: 你的投射物法术一定几率复制，但你更容易受到投射物伤害

name: Faster Wands (One-off)
desc: All wands you're currently carrying gain a bonus to their cast delay & reload time.
descZh: 目前持有的所有魔杖获得施放延迟和装填时间的加成。

name: Extra Wand Capacity (One-off)
desc: The wands you're currently carrying gain 1-3 additional spell slots (to a maximum of 25).
descZh: 目前持有的魔杖获得 1-3 额外法术槽（直至上限 25）。

name: Contact Damage
desc: Enemies near you take damage, the damage is higher the lower your health gets.
descZh: 接近你的敌人受到伤害；你的生命值越低，伤害越高。

name: Extra Perk
desc: From now on you will find an extra perk in every Holy Mountain.
descZh: 从现在开始，你会在每座神圣之山找到额外的特性。

name: Perk Lottery
desc: When you pick a perk, there's a 50% chance the others won't disappear.
descZh: 挑选特性时，有 50% 几率其他特性不会消失。

name: Gamble (One-off)
desc: You gain two random perks.
descZh: 你获得两个随机特性。

name: Extra Item In Holy Mountain
desc: There will be an additional item in every Holy Mountain you haven't discovered yet.
descZh: 在你尚未造访的每座神圣之山中追加一件额外物品。

name: More Hatred
desc: Creatures become more aggressive towards each other.
descZh: 生物之间变得更加富有侵略性。

name: More Love
desc: Creatures become more friendly towards each other.
descZh: 生物之间变得更加友善。

name: Peace with Gods
desc: You make peace with your Gods.
descZh: 你与你的神同在。

name: Kills to mana
desc: Every time an enemy near you dies, you release mana-recharging liquid.
descZh: 每次你附近的敌人死亡时，你会释放出补充法力的液体。

name: Rage-fueled Levitation
desc: Killing an enemy makes you replenish some of your levitation power.
descZh: 杀死敌人可补充部分浮空能量。

name: Pinpointer
desc: Your spells fly faster and have lower spread, and you have a handy sightline for aiming!
descZh: 你的法术飞行更快、散射更小，而且获得了一条方便的瞄准线！

name: Personal Plasma Beam
desc: You constantly fire a devastating plasma beam, but you fire spells much slower
descZh: 你持续发射摧枯拉朽的电浆束，但发射法术要慢上许多

name: Summon Sädekivi (One-off)
desc: You gain an artefact that allows you to call the celestial rage.
descZh: 你获得了一件神器，让你可以呼唤天庭之怒。
